title: Commerce owner self-service web area (operational editing + force-password + credential email)

tasks.title: Add isCommerceOwnerRole helper + commerce nav gating to account-roles
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/lib/account-roles.ts add `isCommerceOwnerRole(role)` (true for COMMERCE_OWNER, plus admin/superadmin as today's host helper does) and a commerce-nav constant. Mirror the existing isHostRole / ROLES_WITH_ACCOMMODATIONS_NAV pattern. Tests: unit test in apps/web test/ asserting true for COMMERCE_OWNER + admin roles, false for tourist/host-only/null.

tasks.title: Add i18n keys (es/en/pt) for the commerce owner self-service area
tasks.description: In packages/i18n add keys for: nav label 'Mi comercio', list page (title, empty state, per-vertical badges), editor field-group labels (openingHours, contactInfo, socialNetworks, media, menuUrl, priceRange, richDescription, amenities, features), read-only identity notice, save/success/error states. Provide es + en + pt. Tests: i18n catalog completeness test (all 3 locales have the new keys).

tasks.title: Add OwnerListingSummary view type + list-response schema in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: In packages/schemas add a thin commerce 'OwnerListingSummary' view type (id, vertical: 'gastronomy'|'experience', name, slug, type, hasActiveSubscription, public visibility flag) and the list-response Zod schema for the new /mine endpoints. REUSE the existing updateOwn operational schemas — do NOT redefine editable field schemas. Tests: unit test that the summary schema parses both gastronomy and experience rows and rejects unknown vertical.

tasks.title: Add owner-scoped listOwn service method on GastronomyService
tasks.description: In packages/service-core add a `listOwn`/owner-scoped search returning the actor's own gastronomy listings (filter ownerId = actor.id, soft-delete excluded). Reuse BaseCommerceListingService scoping (_executeAdminSearch ownerId pattern) but at the owner tier. Tests: unit tests — owner sees only their rows, deleted excluded, empty for a non-owner actor.

tasks.title: Add owner-scoped listOwn service method on ExperienceService
tasks.description: Mirror T-004 for ExperienceService (own experience listings, ownerId scoping, soft-delete excluded). Factor shared logic into BaseCommerceListingService if clean. Tests: unit tests symmetric to T-004.

tasks.title: Add protected GET /gastronomy/protected/mine endpoint
tasks.description: Add owner-scoped protected endpoint listing the session user's own gastronomy listings via T-004. Mirror the existing gastronomy/protected route-tree conventions (createListRoute / ResponseFactory, @repo/schemas). Tests: integration — owner gets only their listings, tourist gets empty/forbidden, unauth 401.

tasks.title: Add protected GET /experience/protected/mine endpoint
tasks.description: Mirror T-006 for experiences via T-005. Tests: integration symmetric to T-006.

tasks.title: Add endpoint-gate-matrix rows for the new /mine endpoints (SPEC-145 guard)
tasks.description: Add rows to docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md for GET /gastronomy/protected/mine and GET /experience/protected/mine (CI guard rejects new routes without a matrix row). Note them in apps/api/docs/route-architecture.md. No tests (docs), but the CI matrix guard must pass.

tasks.title: Create mi-cuenta/comercio listing page (SSR, list of owned listings)
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/comercio/index.astro. SSR: read Astro.locals.user, gate with isCommerceOwnerRole (else redirect to signin / mi-cuenta), fetch both /mine endpoints (fetch with credentials:'include'), merge gastronomy+experience into one list, render via AccountLayout with CSS Module. Empty state when no listings. Tests: smoke/component test for gating + list render (owner vs non-owner).

subtasks.title: List UI + CSS module + empty state

tasks.title: Add 'Mi comercio' nav entry to the mi-cuenta shell
tasks.description: Add the commerce subsection entry to the mi-cuenta sidebar/dashboard, gated by isCommerceOwnerRole (T-001) so only commerce owners see it. Tests: render test showing the entry appears for COMMERCE_OWNER and is hidden for tourist/host-only.

tasks.title: Create per-listing editor route (SSR getById-own + read-only identity)
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/comercio/[vertical]/[id]/editar.astro (vertical = gastronomia|experiencias). SSR: fetch the owner's listing via the existing protected getById (per vertical), 404/redirect if not owner, render a READ-ONLY identity block (name, slug, type, destino) + mount the editor island. CSS module. Tests: smoke — owner reaches editor, non-owner gets 404/redirect.

tasks.title: Build editor island scaffolding (native form, submit hook to protected patch)
tasks.description: Create CommerceListingEditor.client.tsx: native HTML form (NOT TanStack Form), section layout, dirty-state tracking, a small submit hook that PATCHes the correct protected endpoint per vertical (gastronomy|experience /protected/patch, credentials:'include'), success/error handling + i18n messages. Vanilla CSS / CSS Module. Tests: unit test the submit hook (correct URL/body per vertical, error surfaced).

tasks.title: Editor: simple field groups (menuUrl, priceRange, richDescription, contactInfo)
tasks.description: Implement the simple operational field groups in the editor island: menuUrl (url input), priceRange (select/enum), richDescription (textarea/rich), contactInfo (phone/email/website inputs). Wire each to the patch submit. Tests: component tests — edit + submit persists, validation errors shown.

tasks.title: Editor: structured field groups (openingHours, socialNetworks)
tasks.description: Implement the structured operational groups: openingHours (per-day structured editor producing the JSON shape the updateOwn schema expects) and socialNetworks (labeled URL rows). Wire to patch. Tests: component tests — structured input round-trips to the correct JSON, invalid entries rejected.

tasks.title: Editor: media gallery group
tasks.description: Implement the media operational group reusing the web app's existing media handling patterns (upload/reorder/remove producing the media payload updateOwn expects). Wire to patch. Tests: component test — add/remove/reorder produces correct media array, submit persists.

tasks.title: Editor: amenities/features multi-select groups
tasks.description: Implement amenityIds / featureIds multi-select groups: fetch the available amenities/features catalog, render selectable chips/list, persist the selected id arrays via patch. Tests: component test — selection round-trips to amenityIds/featureIds arrays.

tasks.title: Service: approve-lead-and-provision orchestration
tasks.description: Add an orchestration path so approving a commerce lead provisions the owner in one step: compose lead handling (status 'approved') with CommerceOwnerProvisioningService.provisionCommerceOwner (creates COMMERCE_OWNER user + sends CommerceOwnerCredentials email). Live in commerce-lead.service.ts or a thin coordinator. Idempotent / guarded against double-provision. Tests: unit — approve provisions user + calls email port once; reject does NOT provision; re-approve does not double-provision.

tasks.title: API: single approve-and-provision admin action
tasks.description: Wire a single admin action calling T-017 — extend apps/api/src/routes/commerce/admin/mark-handled.ts (e.g. an optional provision flag when status='approved') or add a dedicated route. Requires COMMERCE_EDIT_ALL. Add an endpoint-gate-matrix row if a new route is created. Tests: integration — POST approve+provision creates the owner user and triggers the credential email (stub), reject path unaffected.

subtasks.title: Permission + matrix row if new route

tasks.title: Admin UI: surface 'Approve & provision' in the leads inbox
tasks.description: In apps/admin (TanStack/Tailwind) add the combined 'Approve & provision' action to the commerce-leads inbox: confirmation dialog, calls the T-018 endpoint via TanStack Query mutation, success/error toast, invalidates the leads list. Tests: component test for the action + mutation wiring (mocked).

tasks.title: Integration: mustChangePassword interplay with mi-cuenta/comercio
tasks.description: Verify end-to-end that a freshly provisioned COMMERCE_OWNER (mustChangePassword=true) hitting mi-cuenta/comercio is first forced through mi-cuenta/cambiar-contrasena by the existing web middleware gate, then can reach the commerce area after clearing the flag. Reuses the SPEC-239 gate — no new mechanism. Tests: integration/middleware test for the redirect order.

tasks.title: Integration: owner edits reflected on the public ficha
tasks.description: Verify operational edits persisted via the owner editor surface on the public pages (/[lang]/gastronomia/[slug] and /[lang]/experiencias/[slug]), including any cache/revalidation path. Tests: integration — patch an operational field, assert it appears on the public detail response.

tasks.title: Regression: updateOwn rejects/strips identity fields (both verticals) [AC-3]
tasks.description: Regression test asserting that a forged identity/core field (name, slug, type, destinationId, lifecycle/visibility/moderation/featured) in an owner updateOwn submit is rejected or stripped server-side, for BOTH GastronomyService and ExperienceService. Asserts persisted row identity unchanged.

tasks.title: Smoke: force-password on first login [AC-4, verify-only]
tasks.description: Smoke/regression that a provisioned COMMERCE_OWNER with mustChangePassword=true is forced through mi-cuenta/cambiar-contrasena before any other authenticated action and the flag clears after a successful change. Mechanism already exists (SPEC-239) — this only asserts it, no rebuild.

tasks.title: Smoke: credential email on provisioning [AC-5, verify-only]
tasks.description: Smoke/regression asserting provisioning a commerce owner sends the CommerceOwnerCredentials email — assert against the notifications stub (type COMMERCE_OWNER_CREDENTIALS, recipient, changePasswordUrl present). Template + send path already exist (SPEC-239) — assert only.

tasks.title: E2E: owner edits gastronomy + experience operational fields [AC-1, AC-2]
tasks.description: E2E: a COMMERCE_OWNER logs into web, sees only their own listings (gastronomy + experience), opens each editor, edits an operational field group and persists, sees it reflected on the public ficha; a tourist/non-owner cannot reach the area or another owner's listing (redirect/404). Use Playwright with seeded gastro-owner-*@local.test.

tasks.title: Docs: commerce owner self-service guide + references
tasks.description: Write a short commerce-owner self-service guide (the mi-cuenta/comercio area, what owners can/can't edit, the admin-sells loop), update apps/web/CLAUDE.md with the new area, and confirm route-architecture.md reflects the /mine endpoints (paired with T-008). Docs only.
